title: glochidion calocarpum
intro: Glochidion calocarpum, also known as the Philippine globe fruit, is a type of plant species in the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Glochidion calocarpum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves, fruits, and roots are used to create medicinal remedies.
